sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68004" key="misqo/doulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μισθό-δουλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n68004.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hired slave</tr_>, Anon.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.362</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
